releaseNotes: v0.30.0 — A-Sync-1 cross-device audit-progress sync (Alex's 2026-05-27 email item 8). Pre-fix, completing a zone audit on Windows did NOT mark the zone 'audited today' on Android; in-progress markers were also per-device. Now: complete (green), in-progress (yellow), and cancel all sync both ways via an extension of UpsertZoneOp with two new payload keys (audit_started_at + last_audit_at, ISO timestamps, registered EXEMPT in the free-text PHI screening drift gate). No schema migration — both columns existed on the zones table since v19. Three-reviewer audit (Sonnet sub-agent + manual + Codex CLI in WSL2): rounds 1+2 caught a P1 mixed-version data destruction risk; Codex round-3 caught THREE more findings the prior rounds missed (cancel-of-never-audited-zone explicit-null clear was being dropped, stale-cache race could resurrect peer-deleted zones, test infra modelled the wrong wire shape). All fixed via a `carriesAuditTimestamps` flag that distinguishes 'v0.29 omitted the keys' from 'v0.30 explicitly cleared the keys.' Mixed-version safety baked in — Alex's v0.29.4 emissions during the upgrade window are no-ops for the audit-progress columns, not destructive writes. 604 tests passing (+7 new for A-Sync-1). Auto-updater rolls v0.29.4 → v0.30.0 on next launch.
